_comment: Ward settings catalog — hand-curated metadata for Claude Code settings keys.
This is a MINIMAL VALID STUB (Plan 29, Task 2); Task 3 REPLACES it with the
full documented key set. It is compiled into the binary via include_str! and
deserialized into settings::SettingsCatalog, so unknown keys like this
_comment are ignored on parse.
Top-level shape: { categories: string[], defs: SettingDef[] }.
Each record in `defs` is a SettingDef:
key         (string, required)  the settings key, e.g. "theme" or "permissions"
label       (string, required)  short human title
description (string, required)  one to two sentences on what it does
category    (string, required)  grouping label; should appear in `categories`
valueType   (string, required)  one of bool|enum|number|string|array|object
default     (any,    optional)  documented default value; omit when none
enumValues  (string[], enum)    allowed values; REQUIRED when valueType==enum
targetFile  (string, required)  "settings.json" (default) or "claudeJson" (~/.claude.json)
scopes      (string[], optional) writable scopes, subset of user|project|local
managedOnly (bool,   optional)  true when only settable via managed-settings.json
minVersion  (string, optional)  first Claude Code version supporting the key
docsUrl     (string, optional)  link to the documenting page
editor      (string, object)    REQUIRED when valueType==object; one of
permissions|hooks|env|sandbox|statusLine|json

defs.label: Include co-authored-by trailer
defs.description: Add the `Co-authored-by: Claude` trailer to git commits and pull requests Claude Code creates.

defs.label: Theme
defs.description: Colour theme for the Claude Code terminal UI.

defs.label: Chat retention (days)
defs.description: How many days Claude Code locally retains chat transcripts before cleaning them up.

defs.label: Permissions
defs.description: Tool and Bash permission rules — allow / ask / deny lists, default mode, and additional working directories.
